title: [FIRRTL] infer width (io) (core dump)
body:
The following FIRRTL program:

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    input inp_a: UInt
    output _tmp46: UInt
    _tmp46 <= inp_a
```

Compiled with `firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v` fails with the following core dump:

```
0.      Program arguments: ../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --mlir-timing --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v
1.       #0 0x000000000048512d llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x48512d)
 #1 0x0000000000482f64 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x482f64)
 #2 0x00000000004830c3 SignalHandler(int) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x4830c3)
 #3 0x0000000004890a30 __restore_rt (/lib64/libpthread.so.0+0x13a30)
 #4 0x0000000004cb24a5 raise (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x3d4a5)
 #5 0x0000000004c9b864 abort (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x26864)
 #6 0x0000000004c9b749 _nl_load_domain.cold (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x26749)

 #9 0x00000000005b59c2 llvm::isa_impl_wrap<(anonymous namespace)::RootExpr, (anonymous namespace)::Expr const*, (anonymous namespace)::Expr const*>::doit((anonymous namespace)::Expr const* const&) /home/drom/work/github/llvm/circt/build/../llvm/llvm/include/llvm/Support/Casting.h:132:3
#10 0x00000000005b3c0f llvm::isa_impl_wrap<(anonymous namespace)::RootExpr, (anonymous namespace)::Expr const* const, (anonymous namespace)::Expr const*>::doit((anonymous namespace)::Expr const* const&) /home/drom/work/github/llvm/circt/build/../llvm/llvm/include/llvm/Support/Casting.h:124:3
#11 0x00000000005b126b bool llvm::isa<(anonymous namespace)::RootExpr, (anonymous namespace)::Expr const*>((anonymous namespace)::Expr const* const&) /home/drom/work/github/llvm/circt/build/../llvm/llvm/include/llvm/Support/Casting.h:144:1

#22 0x00000000005a95ca llvm::iterator_range<llvm::po_iterator<(anonymous namespace)::Expr*, llvm::SmallPtrSet<llvm::GraphTraits<(anonymous namespace)::Expr*>::NodeRef, 8u>, false, llvm::GraphTraits<(anonymous namespace)::Expr*> > > llvm::post_order<(anonymous namespace)::Expr*>((anonymous namespace)::Expr* const&) /home/drom/work/github/llvm/circt/build/../llvm/llvm/include/llvm/ADT/PostOrderIterator.h:189:43
#23 0x00000000005a74f2 (anonymous namespace)::ConstraintSolver::solve() /home/drom/work/github/llvm/circt/build/../lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/InferWidths.cpp:410:64
